name: HMS Charles McIver (4.37)
events: 4 Aug 1943 After emergency repairs, HMS Unison (Lt. J.E.E.D. Haward, RN) departed Bizerta for diving trials. After these had been completed she and HMS Unrivalled (Lt. H.B. Turner, DSC, RN) departed Bizerta around 1100 B/4, for passage to Malta escorted by HMS Clacton (A/Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) L.S. Shaw, RNR).
Around 0730 B/5, the armed yacht HMS Charles McIver (Lt. R.T. Patterson, RANVR) took over the escort duties. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
